```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontName Arial
skinparam classFontSize 12
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8F5E9
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor #81C784
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #000000

skinparam classIconBorderColor #81C784
skinparam classIconFontColor #000000

skinparam classIconTextBorderColor #81C784

skinparam classIconTextAlignment center
skinparam classIconTextFontName Arial
skinparam classIconTextFontSize 10

skinparam classIconTextBorderColor #81C784

skinparam classIconTextMargin 5

class "signUp" as signUp {
    -id: int
    -firstName: string
    -lastName: string
    -userName: string
    -email: string
    -password: string
    +signUp(): void
}

class "User" as User {
    -id: int
    -userName: string
    -password: string
    +logIn(): void
    +signUp(): int
}

class "signIn" as signIn {
    -userName: string
    -password: string
    +logIn(): void
    +getUserId(): int
}

class "registerItem" as registerItem {
    -id: int
    -description: string
}

class "determinesWithoutAction" as determinesWithoutAction {
}

class "incubate" as incubate {
}

class "reference" as reference {
}

class "determinesWithAction" as determinesWithAction {
}

class "delegate" as delegate {
}

class "planAction" as planAction {
}

class "Date" as Date {
    -year: int
    -month: int
    -day: int
    +Date(year: int, month: int, day: int)
    +getYear(): int
    +getMonth(): int
    +getDay(): int
    +setYear(year: int): void
    +setMonth(month: int): void
    +setDay(day: int): void
    +toString(): string
    +setDate(year: int, month: int, day: int)
}

class "Time" as Time {
    -second: int
    -minute: int
    -hour: int
    +Time()
    +Time(second: int, minute: int, hour: int)
    +getHour(): int
    +getMinute(): int
    +getSecond(): int
    +setHour(year: int): void
    +setMinute(minute: int): void
    +setSecond(second: int): void
    +toString(): string
    +setTime(second: int, minute: int, hour: int)
    +nextSecond(): Time
}

signUp -- User
User -- signIn

@enduml
```
